contracts.authority: Pinned official Astro MDX is authoritative; benchmark labels and all retrieval artifacts are derived.
contracts.evidence_locator: Every hard evidence binding names the exact repo path, heading path, character interval, file digest, and selected-text digest.
contracts.prompt_isolation: Only the question string is supplied to a consultation alternative; qrels and ground truth remain evaluator-only.
contracts.qrels: Qrels contain canonical English documentation routes and their opaque manifest source IDs.
